title: arrhenatherum elatius var. microstachyum
intro: Arrhenatherum elatium var. microstachyum, also known as false oat-grass or small-spiked meadow-grass, is a perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high content of essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Arrhenatherum elatium var. microstachyum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and roots, which can be used to treat various health issues, including fever, respiratory problems, and skin conditions.
